title: dacryodes metallica
intro: Dacryodes metallica, also known as the African pear or bush mango, is a tropical tree native to West Africa, belonging to the family Burseraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, derived from its leaves, seeds, and bark. The health benefits of Dacryodes metallica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, oil, and powder, which can be used to treat various conditions, and it is often consumed raw or used in traditional medicine.
